calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Jordan Goldstein As Successor Trustee; For Removal Of Christine Witherspoon As Successor Trustee; And For Issuance Of Bond
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for and with Jordan Goldstein.
Mercy Hall for Christine Witherspoon.

Ms. Hall stated that she made many attempts to contact Ms. Witherspoon and was unable to reach her, that she just discovered las night that Ms. Witherspoon's phone has been disconnected and that she has no objection. Ms. Friedeberg stated that she made the request to amend the Trust in an abundance of caution in dealing with Social Security and the Department of Health Care Services. Ms. Goldstein stated that she has done a cursory accounting, that everything seems to be in order and that the Trust is not under Court supervision. The Court informed Ms. Friedeberg that this isn't a Trust the Court would have approved and that it will not incorporate the amendment relief. The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of Jordan Goldstein as Successor Trustee; for Removal of Christine Witherspoon as Successor Trustee; and for Issuance of Bond (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $227,000.00.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
